highlights.summary: TS EAMCET Cutoff 2025 has been released for the General (Home State) category for admission to Keshav Memorial College of Engineering. Aspiring candidates can visit the official website to know more about the counselling and admission procedure.

faqs.question: How to apply for BTech at KMCE Ibrahimpatnam?
faqs.answer:
The Keshav Memorial College of Engineering application process takes place online. The application process is explained in the following steps:
Step 1: Visit the official website of Keshav Memorial College of Engineering.
Step 2: Go to the 'Admissions' tab.
Step 3: Follow the 'Admission Procedure' provided.
Step 4: Complete the application process to secure admission to the college.

faqs.question: Can I get into Keshav Memorial College of Engineering with 85%?
faqs.answer: Keshav Memorial College of Engineering offers admission solely on the basis of the merit acquired in the qualifying exam, and the scores obtained in the entrance exam. However, the college has not specified a minimum aggregate in Class 12. Candidates with 85% typically have a decent chance at securing admission to the college.

faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offered by the Keshav Memorial College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Keshav Memorial College of Engineering tuition fee costs around INR 2.48 L. This fee is exclusive of other components such as Application Fee, Examination Fee, Security Deposit, Hostel Fee, etc. The fee is taken from the official website of the college. However, it is still subject to change. Candidates are advised to visit the official website before applying to KMCE Ibrahimpatnam.

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at Keshav Memorial College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered at Keshav Memorial College of Engineering during the recent placements stood at INR 10 LPA for the Class of 2025. In addition to this, the average package stood at INR 5.26 LPA. KMCE Ibrahimpatnam invites eminent recruiters for placements including Amazon, Microsoft, Google, DBS, TCS, HSBC, Jade, Wipro, Cognizant, Virtusa, Persistent, Opentext, MAQ Software, ADP, Deloitte, Tech Mahindra, and ZenSar.

college_info.intro:
Keshav Memorial College of Engineering offers a B.Tech programme at the undergraduate level across different specialisations. The specialisations include Computer Science Engineering, CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), and Electronics and Communication Engineering.
B.Tech graduates from KMCE Ibrahimpatnam acquire technical, analytical, and problem-solving skills across various engineering disciplines. The program emphasises innovation, ethical responsibility, and practical application through hands-on training and industry exposure. It fosters intellectual growth, professional development, and societal contribution. Graduates are well-prepared for careers in core industries, research, and government sectors

placements.overview:
Keshav Memorial College of Engineering has a dedicated and fully functional placement cell that oversees all training and placement-related activities. The Training and Placement Cell serves as the official support system for facilitating the placement of final-year students, coordinating both on-campus and pooled-campus recruitment drives. It also plays a crucial role in preparing students to confidently face the final stage of their academic journey through various grooming and training sessions. The placement team works diligently to bridge the gap between student aspirations and recruiter expectations, ensuring a successful placement process for all stakeholders involved.

As per the recent placement statistics, the highest and average packages stood at INR 10 LPA and INR 5.26 LPA, respectively, for the batch of . The recruiters at KMCE Ibrahimpatnam include , among others.

faqs.answer: A:    KMCE facilitates a fully functional Training and Placement Cell. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it is a good college with decent placements and modern facilities.

review_content.Placements: 40 percent of students got placed in top companies. Evjazz and Risposta are the top companies that hire many students. The highest is 7 LPA, and the lowest package is 5 LPA. The average package is 5 LPA. More than 50 percent of students got internships from CSE as SES.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are top-notch. Classrooms are well-lit, spacious, and have a modern vibe. Each classroom is equipped with projectors. PS and FDS labs are neat and well-maintained with Wi-Fi access. The food in the canteen is tasty and is available at reasonable prices.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Best engineering college.

review_content.Placements: Keshav Memorial College of Engineering is under KMIT. It is the best college in Telangana. In my college, the lowest package was 6 LPA and the highest package was 24 LPA in my course CSE (AIML). The companies we get offered by Google, Infosys, etc. My college is the best to learn coding, not much, but compared to Telangana colleges, it is the best.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is good equipment and labs, in each class there is a projector, and the faculty is very good. In each classroom, there is a projector and good books in the library. We can take books home for reading by using the student's library card. Sports we have badminton, volleyball, football, and other indoor games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Extremely good faculty in technical terms, with proper sports and infrastructure facilities.

review_content.Placements: College placements are completely dependent on individual performance, the better we perform, the more opportunities we get! Companies are brought in with various package levels, from low to high. Usually, placements are given to the maximum number of students being passed out.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very well authorized. Classrooms are well-maintained and clean. Labs have all the working equipment; if not, they will be bought without any delay. The library has all kinds of material regarding subjects. Washrooms are proper and clean. Sports rooms and grounds have all the equipment and will be guided accordingly

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and decent placements.

review_content.Placements: 50% of students got placed in our course. The highest package is 35 LPA. The lowest package is 5 LPA. The average package is 10 LPA - 12 LPA. These are the packages offered by our college for CSE courses. Top recruiters are Infosys, TCS, and Cognizant. Almost 40% of students got internships. The top role offered is web developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college facilities and infrastructure of our department were really good and ambiance environment to study and to concentrate and focus on studies. Our college has built its website to give good facilities and not depend on others. Classrooms are very good. Our college has a vast area of library and it contains all types of books. Our college has no hostels. Coming to sports we have a big ground and we play a lot of games and they also provide indoor games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the placements. It has the best placements.

review_content.Placements: Students who score about 7 CGPA get placements. There are a lot of courses that make our future better. The starting salary package is about 10 LPA. Faculty members are very humble in providing jobs and seniors also help us to get offers from companies like Tata and Google.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are libraries like digital libraries and also books are available. Classrooms are good and have good ventilation. There are many labs for the students. We can access the Wi-Fi which is available for all. There is no hostel facility in our college besides the college there are many PG hostels which have excellent facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good and excellent .

review_content.Placements: Seventy percent of students in the CSD course are placed. The highest package is 44 LPA, and the lowest is 5 LPA. Our college is not autonomous, but the education is good. There are no hostels, but you can find hostels 1.5 km away from the college. There is good faculty in our college, and no ragging is allowed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The faculty is good and available for all courses in our college. They provide Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, and also finishing school. There is no hostel, but the faculty is good. The canteen food is good, and they provide sports and games,. There is medical faculty also.

description: Keshav Memorial College Of Engineering, Ibrahimpatnam TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 19276 and 28164 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the closing

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 19276, 23798 and 28164, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

reviews.review_heading: Review of KMCE by Abhilash Kathroju.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was below average. Classrooms didn't feel like B.Tech classrooms; they felt more like tier 2 school classrooms. The FS rooms were good but they were better, with AC, and the size of the classroom was also good. The mess area was pretty average, considering the college had almost 700 students studying there every day. Labs were also not good, and the library was average.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and offers value for money compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good environment and is a peaceful place. The college is good, but there are no hostels for students. Students stay in private hostels, and the college needs to build hostels because the private hostels are far from the college.

reviews.review_heading: I'm okay with this college but not fully okay, college has small area and no big infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not much good, there is no hostel in this college so you have to stay in a private hostel nearby, the college conducts events very well with a good number of events, has strict restrictions, Wi-Fi is available, and labs are okay.

college_info.college_name: Aryan Institute of Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Aryan Institute of Technology admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Aryan Institute of Technology:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Aryan Institute of Technology offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma and UG Diploma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MBA/PGDM. The Aryan Institute of Technology course fee ranges between INR 1,00,800 to 2,44,800.

review_content.Infrastructure: There are 3 to 4 faculty members per branch. There is no Wi-Fi facility in the college. The classrooms are big, but there are no students. The hostel rooms are small, but the quality of food is not good because they provide food to students from nearby dhaba. One can only get biscuits, Namkeen and samosa in the canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: It is an average college with good faculty. Below average placement. All the department is good but the computer science and engineering is very poor. There is no canteen in campus. Location is also not good. Costly because it’s under Techno India group so it is a bit expensive.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2012
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: It was good in year 2008. But condition had got deteriorated with the time. Faculty and management both lacked in intellect and knowledge. They would always look to opportunity to get the money from students and impose the unnecessary charges. Never returned the security amount.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Aryan college of institute.

review_content.Infrastructure: Our class room was big enough to accommodate approx. 55 students at a time. we have Wi-Fi facilities and there are so much sports activities like playing outdoor games to stay physically fit. We have long campus and big ground and we have a canteen too.

overview_faqs.question: Is Aryan Institute of Technology a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Aryan Institute of Technology is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma, UG Diploma, MBA/PGDM courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Aryan Institute of Technology has a rating of 1.9 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 1.83 on Campus Life, 2 on Placements, 1.83 on Faculty and 1.67 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Aryan Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The faculty are not qualified, and they are lazy. The main motive is not to teach students but earn.

content.Placements: There are no placements in the college. At the time of admission they will say many companies are coming to our college but till now no companies have come. If you want to take admission in this college then it will be the worst mistake of your life. Seniors always complain about that there are no teachers and no one is coming to teach them.
content.Infrastructure: There are 3 to 4 faculty members per branch. There is no Wi-Fi facility in the college. The classrooms are big, but there are no students. The hostel rooms are small, but the quality of food is not good because they provide food to students from nearby dhaba. One can only get biscuits, Namkeen and samosa in the canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015

content.Other: It is an average college with good faculty. Below average placement. All the department is good but the computer science and engineering is very poor. There is no canteen in campus. Location is also not good. Costly because it’s under Techno India group so it is a bit expensive.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2012

content.Other: It was good in year 2008. But condition had got deteriorated with the time. Faculty and management both lacked in intellect and knowledge. They would always look to opportunity to get the money from students and impose the unnecessary charges. Never returned the security amount.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Aryan college of institute.

content.Infrastructure: Our class room was big enough to accommodate approx. 55 students at a time. we have Wi-Fi facilities and there are so much sports activities like playing outdoor games to stay physically fit. We have long campus and big ground and we have a canteen too.
content.Faculty: We have 44 teachers and 24 professors in our college. they give our full facilities to our students. we learn so much from our respected teachers and we respect our great principal who gave us this college campus.

review_content.Placements: There were many interviews, but due to further study, I didn't take part in the placement process. Anyway, its good to see that many companies have taken part in the placements during our batch its possible, and we were glad about it. Overall, the placements were good.`
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good. It the better place to study as there is enough space in the room. The labs for us are good. reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Great college in the study of computer science and technology.

review_content.Placements: Placement in our college is very good. Maximum package offered is 8 lakh and the minimum package offered is 3 lakh in the placement of our college. Aegis, Infosys etc. companies came to our college placement. Our college is known for good placements in computer engineering. I was selected as a programmer in Aegis. The company offered a rupees 19,500 per month salary.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good for our college. The coolest thing of our college is our campus design. Classrooms are very good and large. The library is available for 18 hours a day. We have cricket and football grounds where we play in our free time. The quality of food available in the canteen is hygienic and delicious with and affordable price. Hostel rooms are also large and clean.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college if you don't have other options.

review_content.Placements: Our college didn't provide good placements during our tenure. Some local companies visited here for placements, but they all didn't offer satisfactory jobs. Some companies did not provide proper technical jobs. Our college didn't have a separate department for placements, and none of the students shows responsibility to attend placements in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good infrastructure in huge enough and proper labs. It has almost every laboratory, huge parking, huge garden, huge canteen and huge activities hall. So, in terms of infrastructure, our college is very good. There is a good environment in our college. There is a huge garden so we can relax there during our free time.

admission_overview.college_name: Palamuru University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: Palamuru University admission 2025isentrance-based.Located in Telangana, Palamuru University is a state-level University. It offers a total of19courses at UG and PG levels, along with aPhDprogramme in various specialisations. Palamuru University admission is available in theofflineandOnlinemode. Admission to all the programmes (excluding MSW) is based on a candidate’s valid score in the respectiveentrance examaccepted byPalamuru University.
Students of the University are placed in companies like Hetero Labs Ltd., Symed Labs Ltd., Chaitanya School, MSN Pharma Labs, IOCL, Vodafone, Honda, Google, etc.

Palamuru University offers 19 courses with various specialisations to interested candidates. The courses are offered in the regular/full-time mode. People can apply through the DOST portal online for their desired course. The courses are offered at the undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral course levels. Learn more through the highlights table below:

Palamuru University admission process for its programs may differ upon their respective stream. The university accepts various entrance exams for admission. Here are some important admission requirements forPalamuru University courses:
Eligibility
Minimum 45% aggregate in Class 12 from a recognised board
At least 50% in Class 12 from a recognised board, and 40% in graduation
Minimum 50% aggregate in graduation
Minimum 50% aggregate in graduation
TS PGECET/GPAT
Postgraduation with relevant subjects

The courses at Palamuru University are offered at different course fees. The course fee varies with different course levels, specialisations, and programmes. Candidates who have been shortlisted by the admission process are eligible to pay the course fee. The total number of seats and Palamuru University fees are given below:
NOTE:The above-mentioned fee and seat intake are taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

Candidates wishing to apply to the Palamuru University courses must follow the admission process in order to secure a seat in their desired course. There are more than 15 courses on offer by Palamuru University in the admission session of 2025. Candidates must apply for the course through the application form on the portal. Given below are the steps for the admission process :
Step 1: Palamuru University Application Process 2025

Candidates wishing to apply for the UG courses must apply for their desired course through the Degree Online Services Telangana (DOST) portal. Candidates must fill in the required personal and academic details. Candidates must pay the required application fee of INR 200 to successfully register for the course.
Step 2: Verification Process

Candidates must appear for the verification process that is conducted by the university. Candidature is authenticated through the process of document verification. Candidates must keep with themselves their required documents, such as Class 10 and Class 12 marksheets.
Step 3: Seat Allotment

Candidates who have cleared the admission process become eligible to pay the course fee and secure their seat in their desired course. Candidates can proceed to attend the regular classes once they have started.

placement_data.title: Palamuru University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: nbsp;As per the NIRF report 2024 released by Palamuru University, the median package offered during UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3.85 LPA and INR 3.3 LPA , respectively. Earlier, the University has released the NIRF report 2023. According to the report, 18 UG 4-years and 65 PG 2-years students were placed during Palamuru University placements 2022. Further, the median package offered to UG 4-years and PG 2-years students during Palamuru University placements 2022 was INR 3.75 and INR 3.20 LPA , respectively. The top recruiters of Palamuru University during the past years included Wipro, Tech Mahindra, The Orchid, ISR Space, HCL, Trident , etc.

faqs.question: How costly is Palamuru University?
faqs.answer: Palamuru University established in 2008, by State Government it is located in mahabub nagar. MBA fees - 27,050 ( first year) MSw fees - 23,600 ( first year) M.Com fees - 25,100 (first year) M.A fees - 23,600 ( first year) B.Sc + M.Sc fees - 32,600 ( first year) M.Sc fees - 32,600 ( first year) M.ed fees - 62,600 ( first year)

faqs.question: How costly is Palamuru University for MBA course?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Palamuru University MBA ranges between INR 53,400 and INR 54,000. The fee is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, is indicative. Aspirants need to pay the course fee after completion of the selection rounds to confirm their seat in the university. Apart from tuition fee, there are other components also included in the course fee. In the start, candidates also require to pay an application fee to register for a course. The application fee for MBA is INR 700.

faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at Palamuru University?
faqs.answer: The Palamuru University is located in Mahabubnagar and it offers various UG courses for students. The different courses have different fee structures.For example to do MCA the fee structure is INR 1.76 Lakhs for 4 years. For an MBA you need to pay INR 27,050 for year. For M.Sc course you need to pay 32,600 per year. For MA the fee is 23,600 per year. For B.Sc + M.Sc you need to pay 32,600 for every year. For M.ED the fee structure is 62,600 per year. for the M.SW course the fee structure is INR 23,600 per year.

faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Ed at Palamuru University?
faqs.answer: As per the unofficial sources, Palamuru University B.Ed fees ranges between INR 5,800 - INR 70,000. This fee range contains the tuition fee for both the years of the course. The tuition fee is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, is indicative. Aspirants need to pay the course fee after completion of the selection rounds to confirm their seat in the university. Apart from tuition fee, there are other components also included in the course fee.

faqs: What is the cut off of Palamuru University?
description: Palamuru University cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Palamuru University TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 44923 and 74489 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the closing rank for the same stood at 53054.

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 44923, 69411 and 74489, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Palamuru University. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

TS ICET is a state-level exam conducted by Kakatiya University Warangal, on behalf of the Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE) for admission to MBA and MCA programmes in Universities/ institutes situated in Telangana. Below mentioned are the steps to register for TS ICET Counselling 2023:

The Palamuru University MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 18890. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 11543, and the 2023 cutoff was 22153 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.
Check the table below to know the year, round, category and quota-wise cutoff.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by PG Centre, Wanaparthy - Palamuru University.Reviewed on 2 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college for graduation.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are decent. Classrooms are large and can accommodate around 100 students. The library is present on the campus. The quality of the hostel is also good. All essential facilities are available in the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dhanvanthri College of Pharmaceutical SciencesReviewed on 30 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great practical exposure, but needs an updated curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Most of the students like girls live in the hostel. It has good facilities like Wi-Fi, good ventilation, good maintenance, and also has good and tasty food available at your time. They also provide lunch boxes for the students who go to college daily.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dhanvanthri College of Pharmaceutical SciencesReviewed on 20 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Good and senior faculty and good campus and extracurricular sports .
reviews.review_text: The is no college hostel but the course subjects and the staff explanations are too good. Every Friday there will be yoga classes for students health purpose, where all the student should be taken care in the auditorium and it feels very good to join this college .

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sri Chittem Narsireddy Memorial Government Degree CollegeReviewed on 2 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are usually spacious, they often come with modern equipments. The laboratories are equipped with modern equipments. Good internet connectivity is provided to the students. In hostel, the food quality is good along with comfortable rooms being available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sri Chittem Narsireddy Memorial Government Degree CollegeReviewed on 26 May 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good, and our college environment is also good. Classrooms are also good; in our college, we have one library. Our college hostel facility is also good, and the food quality is also good. There is no medical facility at our college. Our college has a playground. There is a limited sports facility. We enjoy it.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sri Chittem Narsireddy Memorial Government Degree CollegeReviewed on 26 May 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied for this college and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has a good environment, and the college infrastructure is also good. There is no wi-fi facility available on campus. Only in the labs is there an internet facility. The hostel facility is good, and the food quality is also good. Our college has a library, and all books are available there. At our college, we have one playground. Only a limited number of sports facilities are available there. We enjoy it.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sri Vasavi Degree CollegeReviewed on 15 May 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Vasavi Degree College in Mahbubnagar for B.Com (Computer) admission.
reviews.review_text: This college provides the best facilities and good infrastructure quality. There are hostel facilities that require an additional fee to stay. There are many facilities provided at the college, such as Wi-Fi, classrooms, computer labs, libraries, bathrooms, etc. The sports team organizes sports and game facilities every year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2019Offered by Sri Vasavi Degree CollegeReviewed on 6 May 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Sri Vasavi degree college in Mahabubnagar for B.Com. admission.
reviews.review_text: In this infrastructure, quality is so good, but hostel facilities do not provide for every student. This college department provides multiple facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, drinking water, canteens, etc. Facilities are provided. In this college canteen, food is so tasty. The sports committee organizes sports and games festivals.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2019Offered by Sri Vasavi Degree CollegeReviewed on 8 Apr 2024)
reviews.review_heading: The college has average placements.
reviews.review_text: Our department has good facilities and infrastructure. Facilities are provided by the college management for the students, and Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, games, and sports are available in the college, and labs are provided with computers in the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dhanvanthri College of Pharmaceutical SciencesReviewed on 30 Mar 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college environment and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The facilities offered by the college are good; they provide all the infrastructure facilities that are required for academic sessions. The college also offers hostels with good-quality food for all students. The college also offers medical and sports facilities for the students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by N. T.R. Government Degree and Post Graduate College For WomenReviewed on 20 Mar 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college campus has a good environment, and the and the college infrastructure is also good. The college library has well-stocked books, and all equipment is present in the labs. The hostel facility is also good. In the mess, the food quality is also good. On our campus, we have a limited sports facility. Our college is one of the best government colleges in our city.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by N. T.R. Government Degree and Post Graduate College For WomenReviewed on 20 Mar 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college and its faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good environment, and our college infrastructure is also good. Classrooms are also good. We have a library. The library is well-stocked. The hostel facility is good. In the mess, the food quality is also good. Our college has multiple sports facilities. And playground.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college campus is not so good and the facilities like free Wi-Fi and good classrooms and labs have to improve. The hostels are not there and the canteen is good. Sports and games are well conducted and the library is well stocked.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sri Chittem Narsireddy Memorial Government Degree CollegeReviewed on 29 Feb 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty and college.

Every year, college management conducts sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sri Chittem Narsireddy Memorial Government Degree CollegeReviewed on 29 Feb 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good; our college is one of the best government colleges in our city; students come from surrounding villages; classrooms are also good; and our college has a private library that is always well stocked. In our college canteen, there is a variety of food available. The food quality is average. And, with one playing field, college administration organizes sports events.

faqs.answer: Sri Nandhanam College Of Engineering And Technology has courses such as B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA, M.E./M.Tech to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. Sri Nandhanam College Of Engineering And Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Biotechnology Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Marine Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Structural Engineering.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses does Sri Nandhanam College Of Engineering And Technology offer to students?

faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Sri Nandhanam College Of Engineering And Technology is up to 558. Good thing to know is that Sri Nandhanam College Of Engineering And Technology has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.
faqs.question: Q: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at Sri Nandhanam College Of Engineering And Technology?

faqs.answer: Sri Nandhanam College Of Engineering And Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are

individual_reviews.title: College environment is good for students.

content.Placements: In my college, good percentage of placements are achieved. 80% of students got placed in reputed companies. They offered core courses and IT courses with good teaching. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: According to my knowledge, this is the best choice for the upcoming engineering generation.

review_content.Placements: To be frank, no companies visited the campus to recruit civil engineering students because this college is little far away compared to the other colleges. Previously, 26 companies visited our college, but now, because of heavy competition in today's world, and also as there are many engineering colleges in Berhampur, we are little backward. But, whoever is passed from this college, have the courage to do anything he/she wants to do. They will be in the best position of their life.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a well and spacious campus. There is a college building, a workshop, three canteens, a playground and basketball court are available in the college. There is a hostel facility, and there are seminars halls for every branch. There is a vast conference hall etc. I have described everything that is present inside the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good learning college.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of the students from the mechanical engineering course got placed. The salary offered is 1 lac to Rs. 35,000 per month. IBM, IIC Technologies, Infosys, Infotech and aerospace companies are the top recruiters. The managing director is the top role offered here. Almost 60% of the students got an internship in companies like Hyundai, Kia Motors, Volkswagen, Suzuki, Tata Motors, Hero Honda Motors, Enfield Motors, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available with quality food. Our college is also good at medical treatment, sports and others. It is a very good ambitious college, with a very good atmosphere, faculty members and staff members.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: According to my knowledge, this is the best choice for the upcoming engineering generation.

content.Placements: To be frank, no companies visited the campus to recruit civil engineering students because this college is little far away compared to the other colleges. Previously, 26 companies visited our college, but now, because of heavy competition in today's world, and also as there are many engineering colleges in Berhampur, we are little backward. But, whoever is passed from this college, have the courage to do anything he/she wants to do. They will be in the best position of their life.
content.Infrastructure: We have a well and spacious campus. There is a college building, a workshop, three canteens, a playground and basketball court are available in the college. There is a hostel facility, and there are seminars halls for every branch. There is a vast conference hall etc. I have described everything that is present inside the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: It is a good learning college.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of the students from the mechanical engineering course got placed. The salary offered is 1 lac to Rs. 35,000 per month. IBM, IIC Technologies, Infosys, Infotech and aerospace companies are the top recruiters. The managing director is the top role offered here. Almost 60% of the students got an internship in companies like Hyundai, Kia Motors, Volkswagen, Suzuki, Tata Motors, Hero Honda Motors, Enfield Motors, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available with quality food. Our college is also good at medical treatment, sports and others. It is a very good ambitious college, with a very good atmosphere, faculty members and staff members.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Placements are good in our college and approximately 900 students got placed this year.

content.Placements: Around 30% of students got placed in our course this year. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc. About 100% of students completed internships in our course and 30% of students are placed in companies as testing engineers, full-stack developers, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure for our course are average compared to other courses. Classrooms are average. Labs and library are good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is poor. The food served is good. Sports are encouraged. A canteen is also available nearby our college.

hostel_campus.college_name: Rao Bahadur Y.Mahabaleshwarappa Engineering College (RYMEC) Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Placements are good in our college and approximately 900 students got placed this year.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure for our course are average compared to other courses. Classrooms are average. Labs and library are good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is poor. The food served is good. Sports are encouraged. A canteen is also available nearby our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a better place to study engineering with good faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: RYMEC has very good laboratory facilities for academic purposes along with well-experienced instructors. RYMEC has a huge collection of books in the library for all the branches, and the facility to borrow books is very good. There is also an internet centre with more than 40 computer systems.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely waste of time in this college, zero core placements and infrastructure is age old.
reviews.review_text:
1. All civil laboratories like Geotechnical engineering, Environment Engineering lab, concrete technology lab, library, old classrooms, no Wi-Fi, auditorium, playground, cafeteria. 
2. Food was below par, not hygienic, taste was not good. No proper facilities inside room, no medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The review of Rao Bahadur Y.Mahabaleshwarappa Engineering College (RYMEC).
reviews.review_text: The college is situated on the outskirts of Ballari, and it is spread over 100 acres. Facilities like well-equipped gym, indoor badminton court, and a huge playground for football and cricket are available here. The hostel is available on the campus, and all the labs have adequate equipment. A new block for the mechanical stream has been constructed in 2015.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rao Bahadur Y.Mahabaleshwarappa Engineering College (RYMEC).
reviews.review_text: The campus is spread over 100 acres and has separate blocks for each department. The college was built in the period of Britishers. It is old and well built. The college is considered in the survey conducted on the colleges in Kandivali. Staff and security are good. Around 400 hostels are available. The campus has greenery all around that provides a good study environment. We can get books from the library to gain good knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Life at this campus is good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms in the college were good. The library was my favourite. There was a huge encouragement in sports and games. As usual, the canteen will be the favourite spot in the college as the quality of the food was good for me. I stayed in the college hostel. The hostel is really good as all the facilities are provided for low cost compared to any other hostels. The quality of hostel food was not bad.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, facilities, and study atmosphere. I'm happy to study here.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility is available in Rao Bahadur Y Mahabaleshwarappa Engineering College. It has good library facility and classrooms. Our college is active in sports and games. The college has good parking and canteen facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the view of the campus is good.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the infrastructure is good. The classrooms of all the branches are good. The extracurricular activities are also good on the campus. The indoor stadium of the campus has shuttle, badminton, and the floor is made of wood. In front of that, there is a basketball court, which is good.

reviews.review_heading: Partially satisfied with placements in the year, 2018.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very good. The facilities like library and canteen on the campus. All the classrooms are good, with the capacity of 100 students. The lecturers are good at teaching. Laboratories are also very good. The environment is green which gives positiveness.

reviews.review_heading: All about Roa Bahadur Mahaballeshwarapa College, Bellary
reviews.review_text:
In our college, there are so many facilities including labs, Wi-Fis, etc.
First classrooms look a bit older and not modern but it is okay.
Library is spacious and there are almost all the books that we need for our education.
Medical facilities are not okay but there is a hospital nearby.
Canteen food is average
Hostel rooms are average
No issues with college and staff.

reviews.review_heading: Happy that I'm graduate of this college, but placements were really pathetic. Need to search for job
reviews.review_text: College campus was very good, classrooms were well maintained, labs and computers were in good working condition, food that was available in canteen was average but not that bad too. Hostel was pathetic, no good rooms, completely dirty, also bath rooms were not at all maintained well.

As per my experience the college is good for Middle class students, who want to pay less and gain more. It has good infrastructure but the placements are not so up to the mark. I can say that 65% of placement per year take over in average. Apart from that there is no ragging, no eve teasing because of strictness in college, but no Wi-Fi in hostels. College is 24 hrs. Wi-Fi enabled. As per my experience the college is good for Middle class students, who want to pay less and gain more. It has good infrastructure but the placements are not so up to the mark. I can say that 65% of placement per year take over in average. Apart from that there is no ragging, no eve teasing because of strictness in college, but no Wi-Fi in hostels. College is 24 hrs. Wi-Fi enabled.

reviews.review_heading: You can join this college if you want.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there is a library in which there are more facilities like Wi-Fi, a digital library and many more for students. Overall, classrooms are also maintained neat and clean with many high-quality benches and good boards with a computer screen to explain students well.

reviews.review_heading: I won't say that it's the best. But it's good, be a part of rymec.
reviews.review_text: Not bad. infrastructure, but the out look and infrastructure does't match. Not upto the mark but that's okay you can join anyways. Benches and all are good. I'll give 3 out of 5. And there are waiting halls for girls and canteen is rated 0, not all satisfied and library is good. We can rate it 4 out of 5 !

college_info.college_name: Audisankara Institute of Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Audisankara Institute of Technology admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: For better placement and infrastructure, join Audisankara Institute of Technology.

review_content.Placements: Above 50% of students were placed in Audisankara. The lowest package was 2.5 LPA. Companies like Wipro and Accenture were very interested in taking students from college placements, and many students got internship opportunities in this college. Many roles were offered, like software development, web development, testing, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities were good in this college, and the libraries were well-maintained. Coming to the labs, they were not working properly in some sections. Hostels were good and safe. There were medical facilities in this college, which provided games and sports opportunities to the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure is really good, and based on updated technology, they conduct hackathons.

review_content.Placements: When compared to our seniors, all of my batch students are placed in different companies and industries with a maximum of 93%. Based on the company, the package is also different. The average is around 2.5 LPA, and the highest is 6 LPA. Companies like Hike Education, Kodnest, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are also good. There are different labs available for different branches based on their courses. The college infrastructure is full of greenery. When it comes to the college hostel, it is on campus for girls and the boys' hostel is far from the college. There is a good transportation for day scholars.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure and facilities for events, fests, and sports are really good.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 35-40% of students get placed in our course. The highest package is 9.6 LPA, the lowest is 3.2 LPA, and the average is nearly 4.4 LPA. Wipro, Google, Tech Mahindra, etc., are the top recruiters. Top roles like team leader and coding specialist are offered. Placement interviews are done in a very neat manner.
review_content.Infrastructure: The quality of facilities in our hostel is too bad and not proper maintenance and food not available at proper times. Medical facilities are available in the college. Sports and games are excellent, and they conduct good games for us. Every one or two months, there is a sports event.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of some faculty members.

review_content.Placements: 70% of students got placed in my course. The highest package is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. The average package ranges from 4-5 LPA. Companies like Infosys, Wipro, etc., visit the college for placements. 60% of students got internships in MNCs. Roles like data scientist, data engineer, and AI developer are offered to students.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in my college. The quality is average. The quality of food in the hostel is not good. The canteen and mess are average. Medical facilities are also average. It conducts some cricket and kabaddi games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Yes, our college is well in studies and environment of campus is excellent.

review_content.Placements: 80 percent of students placed in multi national companies in electronics and communication engineering and high package is 12 lack per annum and our college conducted hackathon programs and innovation centre is present in our campus almost my college is the best college in Nellore.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course and department the classrooms are very clean and well PPT rooms and good labs and central library is in my college and the excellent quality of food available in the mess and canteen also and good medical facility.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good placements.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in this course. Around 70% of students got placed at TCS and 45% of students got placed at HCL. Many students got placed at companies like TCS Ninja. Internships are also offered in this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good. Classrooms are decent. Laboratories are great. Medical facilities are available. Drinking water facility is also available. There are 3 canteens in this college. Mess is spacious. Separate hostels are available for both girls and boys.

admission_process.title: Audisankara Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Audisankara Institute of Technology admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Audisankara Institute of Technologyoffers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 1,60,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

description: What's new at Audisankara Institute of Technology cutoff 2023? APICET Counselling 2023 Phase 1 seat allotment result has been released.

hostel_campus.college_name: Audisankara Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: For better placement and infrastructure, join Audisankara Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were good in this college, and the libraries were well-maintained. Coming to the labs, they were not working properly in some sections. Hostels were good and safe. There were medical facilities in this college, which provided games and sports opportunities to the students.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is really good, and based on updated technology, they conduct hackathons.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are also good. There are different labs available for different branches based on their courses. The college infrastructure is full of greenery. When it comes to the college hostel, it is on campus for girls and the boys' hostel is far from the college. There is a good transportation for day scholars.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities for events, fests, and sports are really good.
reviews.review_text: The quality of facilities in our hostel is too bad and not proper maintenance and food not available at proper times. Medical facilities are available in the college. Sports and games are excellent, and they conduct good games for us. Every one or two months, there is a sports event.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of some faculty members.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in my college. The quality is average. The quality of food in the hostel is not good. The canteen and mess are average. Medical facilities are also average. It conducts some cricket and kabaddi games.

reviews.review_heading: Yes, our college is well in studies and environment of campus is excellent.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course and department the classrooms are very clean and well PPT rooms and good labs and central library is in my college and the excellent quality of food available in the mess and canteen also and good medical facility.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. Classrooms are decent. Laboratories are great. Medical facilities are available. Drinking water facility is also available. There are 3 canteens in this college. Mess is spacious. Separate hostels are available for both girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best architecture college in Gudur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The hostel facilities are good. All rooms are very good. The hostel provides good food. It provides vegetarian and non-vegetarian food items. It provides non-vegetarian food items every week for four days. All classrooms are air-conditioned. The infrastructure of our college is very good. There is an individual block for a particular course. All laboratories are good. Our college has a good sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for education.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best hostel facilities and infrastructure. They occasionally provide study hours to help students remember what happened in class. The hostel mess food is average. The hostel room facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for students.
reviews.review_text: Our college has 4 blocks separate from each branch and our campus is fully equipped with Wi-Fi. It has a laboratory for gaining knowledge. It provides a big library on our campus and all books are available. Our classrooms are very hygienic and it is clean and green.

reviews.review_heading: The college is superb to study and also enjoy your B.Tech life.
reviews.review_text: The labs are good. Their way of explaining is superb. The food is good, and cleanliness is maintained. Computer labs have many computers. Physics and chemistry labs have all the equipment and instruments. The hostel rooms and food are good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for studies and the campus is also fine.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not good, but the campus is spacious. The laboratories are in good condition. The canteen is also provided. The classrooms are spacious. It provides bus facilities to various places which are far away from the college.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college in Nellore region.
reviews.review_text: It has good facilities. It has a good canteen and the campus is clean. The food served is also good. We have a good hostel and 24 hours medical facilities. The bus facility is good with safe driving, etc. Some of the sports are conducted and students are getting the awards. The campus is Wi-Fi enbled.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of faculty members and also good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi. Labs are good, and the library is also good. The quality of facilities provided in our hostel is good. The quality of food served in our mess is also good. Games and sports are good in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college, and I would advise every student to choose a good college.
reviews.review_text: I am very satisfied with facilities and infrastructures like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library. There is a huge library and I like it. In the hostel, the service is good and also accommodation is suitable for all types of students like a middle class and below middle class.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, but the hostel is not good enough. The hostel fee is approximately 20,000 per year. For 4 years, it is 80,000. If a student has to join the college hostel, they have to pay 80,000 for the complete course. I suggest people opting for private hostels as they are much better.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Audisankara Institute of Technology

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Mphasis, Wipro, TCS and Medha visit our college for placements.
Our college management is involving in giving more opportunities to the students who are interested in participating in the placements and CRT classes.

review_content.General: There are no placements in my class. I never heard of good placements in any big company. This college is only a money machine. Zero percent placement is provided to my batch and my seniors batch. No placements are provided for the civil department in my batch as well as the senior batch. People make fun of students because there are no placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is not good. There is no playground. We faced water problems several times. The hostel food is of poor quality. The lab's condition is very poor. There are old books in the library and no arrangement of new books. The hostel rooms are small and water quality is poor, no RO and water purifier are present. The medical facilities are average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: I do not recommend anyone to join this college unless he just needs a degree.

review_content.Placements: There are simply zero placements. On the name of placement, they call fake companies and advertise that in newspapers. Or otherwise, in very rare case, they will place you in some assembly line company on contract for like Rs. 6-7,000 per month, where you will find yourself working with labour class.
review_content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi is accessible for students. Toilets are even the worst than public toilets in old railway stations. The classroom condition is a pity. There is nothing in the name of games, and playing a cricket match once in a year is not sports. The labs and canteen are a joke. They are just making buildings and not even painting them, and there is nothing inside that buildings.

review_content.Other: Best thing about this college is its location. It is situated between the mountains. Climate here remains very good. The college is backed by the government of Uttarakhand. It offers B.Tech in 4 streams. Faculty here is good and cooperative. Campus is also good with free Wi-Fi. College is not completely ragging free. Placement of this college is almost nil. Industry exposure is also very less. This college is still in growing phase and is not established yet.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Not satisfied because there were no placements.

content.Placements: No one got placed from my batch. I have done mechanical engineering from this college in 2015, and I got 65% at that time. Not even one company visited the college for placements, but for electronics, only Micromax came from Uttarakhand. They took students at the worker level, no one got placed in the professional line.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is okay. The Wi-Fi facility is provided for hostlers only, and the rooms are good in hostel including A/C facility. The labs and classrooms are good, but there was a shortage of lecturers. The canteen food was not good at my time. The staff of the college is not cooperative, they take a lot of fine on late payment of fee and for shortage of attendance.

admission_overview.college_name: KC Group of Institutions, Una Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_overview.title: KC Group of Institutions, Una Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: KC Group of Institutions, Una admission 2025 is both merit and entrance-based. KC Group of Institutions has 6 institutes along with one public school under it under different unique specialisations.The domains covered are Polytechnic, Research, Hotel Management, Management, Pharmaceutical sciences, Training programmes etc. The college offers 14 programmes at the UG and PG levels. Lateral entry is allowed for only Bonafide Himachali students. The mode of study for the offered courses is full time. The institute accepts exams, such as CBSE 12th and HPBOSE 12th, for admission to some specific KC Group of Institutions, Una courses. For certain programmes, the college considers the merit of the last qualifying exam of candidates, ensuring a comprehensive approach to admissions. The college offers UG courses for 2 years - 4 years. For courses at PG level, the duration is 2 years. Read on to know more about the Fees, Elgibility, admission and application process at KC Group of Institutes UNA.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2015Offered by KC Institute of Engineering and Technology, KC Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 10 Feb 2018)
reviews.review_heading: I do not recommend anyone to join this college unless he just needs a degree.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi is accessible for students. Toilets are even the worst than public toilets in old railway stations. The classroom condition is a pity. There is nothing in the name of games, and playing a cricket match once in a year is not sports. The labs and canteen are a joke. They are just making buildings and not even painting them, and there is nothing inside that buildings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2015Offered by KC Institute of Engineering and Technology, KC Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 25 Oct 2015)
reviews.review_text:
Best thing about this college is its location. It is situated between the mountains. Climate here remains very good. The college is backed by the government of Uttarakhand. reviews.review_text:

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the N.C. College of Engineering:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, N.C. College of Engineering offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Accounting & Commerce. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and B.Com courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The N.C. College of Engineering course fee ranges between INR 1,11,000 to 3,50,000.

Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely disappointed due to lack of placements in 2021.

content.Placements: For now, there are no placements provided due to COVID. Most of the companies denied to visit here. Before Covid, many good companies and organisations used to visit here for their requirements. Right now, no companies are approaching the college and students are searching jobs on their own.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is good. Wi-Fi is provided to the students but it can be improved. Hostel is currently closed for the students of engineering, it is only provided for the faculty members living there. Food was good when I was in first year, after that the mess was closed for all.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Made a few new friends whom are around to this day. The quality is awesome.

content.Placements: I was offered the opportunity to intern at BSNL for which I was extremely grateful. The placements were not great, there were a few companies visiting the campus but most of them were hiring CS and IT students. The salaries were low and were not comparable to the minimum offered in colleges across the country. Some of my friends got selected and grew after they passed out from the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college is big and great with all the latest facilities available. The classrooms are big. The library is big too. The sports fields are vast and most of the students spend much time around the area preparing for tournaments. The quality of food available in the canteen is great with a maggi being the favourite for many students. The building is great and you can see it from far. The garden outside is well maintained too. Many students spend time around the area.

The sports fields are vast and most of the students spend much time around the area preparing for tournaments. The quality of food available in the canteen is great with a maggi being the favourite for many students. The building is great and you can see it from far. The garden outside is well maintained too. Many students spend time around the area.

reviews.review_heading: Okay. Not upto the mark as compared to fee structure.
reviews.review_text: The dependency on the investments of a college is directly proportational to the number of admission. Till 2012 the admission rate was as good as the number of seats available. After that the poor admissions resulted in the deterioration of facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of N.C. College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good enough, but the condition of the classrooms is not good. Toilets are not hygienic. The parks are also not properly maintained, and the condition of benches are also not good. However, the library is good enough.

reviews.review_heading: It is an institute with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of NCCE is quite good. It is equipped with every required facility to make the studies of students better. The campus is lush green. Labs are well-facilitated. There is also a digital library on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: A review on N.C College Of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, and the campus is huge. It has a big library and Wi-Fi is also available on the campus, though the speed of Wi-Fi is not very fast. The classrooms are pretty big and have projectors. The computer labs are also good, but in mechanical and electronics branches, the labs do not have all the equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with nice faculty and facilities but poor placements.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi facility was available with restricted access. Though learning material sites could easily he accessed. Huge sports field with availability of basic equipments was available. The canteen food too was enjoyable. Hostel was average. Otherwise the buildings were well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: The college for the best placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has a great infrastructure with well-established labs, high-speed Wi-Fi. The hostel is also well furnished and has 2 people sharing rooms. The college focus not only on learning, but also various curricular activities of sports as we have a large ground.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied at all because of poor placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good. All the facilities are available there I. e. Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, sports. The quality of the food is also good in the canteen. The hostel rooms are good, but the quality of food in the hostel was very bad. I didn't face any issue related to the infrastructure but got issues with the hostel food, so I left it in the first semester and took PG outside the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: A college that gives good experience.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility was available to the limited area. The labs were good with all equipment, the library was also good, medical facilities were average, sports activities and games were organised mostly during the fest days. Food available in the canteen was costly, and it was okay. The classrooms were good with good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Engineering course is closed here, and you won't be able to destroy your future.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good here, but you won't find air-conditioners working around because of the electricity bill. There is no canteen as well. They don't consider any complaint, and they say that the college is in shortage of funds and can not do such errands. You feel disappointed every time you approach some higher authority.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a gpod faculty.
reviews.review_text: It has Wi-Fi, gallery, 5 AC rooms, 35 classrooms, a well developed campus. There is also big playground of our own college, there is also an English medium school of our own college. There is a kitchen and 5 cooks working there. Undoubtedly our college is the best college.

reviews.review_heading: I am very much satisfied with my college because good facility is there like a family environment.
reviews.review_text: Best facility are given proper Wi-Fi at every floor good speed upto 10-12mbps, labs are excellent all types of machines which required or by which information is providing to student is available. Faculty of labs are very knowledgeable and intelligent and helping nature. Classrooms are well furnished. Library is too good, all the books are available. More than 2-3 authors of one book is available for almost every subject. Hostel is good. Food is normal but not bad. Medical facilities are also av...

reviews.review_heading: I have no words. Our college is best.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are good. A great Achievement and a lot of experience in extraordinary quality like sports, games and other quality all are available in our college. In the canteen all types of food or dinner are available. I really appreciate it. Thank you.

reviews.review_heading: My college is best in india 100% placements.
reviews.review_text: Library and hostel classroom all are good and every month sports are held. The canteen has a good quality of food. In class, AC will be available for medical facilities is also there in my college. The labs have new equipment.

paragraphs: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.

The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

admission_process.title: Vision Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Vision Institute of Technology admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Vision Institute of Technologyoffers courses at UG and After 10th levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech and After 10th Diploma. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,44,800. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 4 years. After 10th courses are offered for 3 years.

description: Vision Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Vision Institute of Technology UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Vision Institute of Technology cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Vision Institute of Technology BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 689891 and 699728 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 689891 for the general AI quota.

Vision Institute of Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Vision Institute of Technology can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Vision Institute of Technology JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Vision Institute of Technology.

As the Vision Institute of Technology UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. For 2025, in the last round, the top three most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, followed by B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering, and B.Tech. in Civil Engineering, with the closing ranks of 2007090, 2109560 and , respectively.
